PROPERTY.NAME: Program Information.Analysis Times.Times
PROPERTY.VALUE: <SAVE_STATE> <STATE NAME="ASCII Strings" TYPE="long" VALUE="740" /> <STATE NAME="Apply Data Archives" TYPE="long" VALUE="408" /> <STATE NAME="Basic Constant Reference Analyzer" TYPE="long" VALUE="8095" /> <STATE NAME="CUSTOM_OPTION_CLASS" TYPE="string" VALUE="ghidra.app.plugin.core.analysis.StoredAnalyzerTimes" /> <STATE NAME="Call-Fixup Installer" TYPE="long" VALUE="17" /> <STATE NAME="Create Address Tables" TYPE="long" VALUE="22" /> <STATE NAME="Create Address Tables - One Time" TYPE="long" VALUE="918" /> <STATE NAME="Create Function" TYPE="long" VALUE="1018" /> <STATE NAME="Data Reference" TYPE="long" VALUE="371" /> <STATE NAME="Decompiler Switch Analysis" TYPE="long" VALUE="370" /> <STATE NAME="Demangler GNU" TYPE="long" VALUE="225" /> <STATE NAME="Disassemble Entry Points" TYPE="long" VALUE="4568" /> <STATE NAME="Embedded Media" TYPE="long" VALUE="52" /> <STATE NAME="External Entry References" TYPE="long" VALUE="1" /> <STATE NAME="Non-Returning Functions - Discovered" TYPE="long" VALUE="610" /> <STATE NAME="Reference" TYPE="long" VALUE="993" /> <STATE NAME="Shared Return Calls" TYPE="long" VALUE="18066" /> <STATE NAME="Stack" TYPE="long" VALUE="4850" /> <STATE NAME="Subroutine References" TYPE="long" VALUE="411" /> </SAVE_STATE>

BOOKMARK.DESCRIPTION: Unable to resolve constructor at 0000008c (flow from 00000090)

FUNCTION.NAME: memory_check
FUNCTION.TYPEINFO_CMT: uint32_t *memory_check(uint32_t *start, uint32_t *end) returns 0 for success, faulty address for error

FUNCTION.TYPEINFO_CMT: uint16_t s_32to16(uint32_t v) return v > 0xffff ? 0xffff : v
